title: bauhinia cupulata
intro: Bauhinia cupulata, also known as the orchid tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation due to the presence of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Bauhinia cupulata include reducing the risk of heart disease, alleviating symptoms of menopause, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
